hooks.command:
bash -c 'if [ -f pom.xml ]; then echo "⚠️  Pre-commit checks will run:
  1. Code formatting (mvn spotless:check)
  2. Unit tests (mvn test)
  3. Coverage check (≥90% required)
  4. Conventional commits format

These checks will BLOCK the commit if they fail."; else echo "ℹ️  Committing (no Maven project detected)"; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -f pom.xml ] && [ -n "$SONAR_TOKEN" ]; then echo "⚠️  Pre-push quality gate will run:
  1. Full test suite (mvn verify)
  2. SonarQube analysis
  3. Quality gate enforcement (≥90% coverage)

This will BLOCK the push if quality gate fails.
This may take several minutes..."; elif [ -f pom.xml ]; then echo "ℹ️  SONAR_TOKEN not set, SonarQube checks will be skipped"; else echo "ℹ️  Pushing (no Maven project detected)"; fi'
hooks.description: Warn about blocking pre-push quality gate

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f pom.xml ]; then echo "💡 Reminder: Run mvn spotless:apply to format code"; fi'
hooks.description: Reminder to format code after edits
